bulk_edit_modal.title: Bulk edit products

product_detail.selling_units_hint: Sell this product in bigger units (e.g. a Strip = 10, a Pack = 30). Stock stays counted in {unit}. Leave empty for a single-unit product.
product_detail.track_expiry_hint: Hold this product as dated batches and sell earliest-expiry-first. Capture an expiry date when you receive stock.
product_detail.mode_unit_hint: Sold as whole pieces — quantity goes up one at a time.
product_detail.mode_weight_hint: Sold by weight. Stock is held in kilograms and the cashier types the weight off the scale; the price below is the price per kg.
product_detail.no_batches: No open batches. Receive stock with an expiry date to create one.

categories.parent_hint: Leave as "None" for a main category. Max {max} levels deep.
categories.move_up_sub: Keeps everything — just re-tags one level up. No stock change.
categories.delete_all_sub: Removes the products too — a stock write-off, so a reason is required.
categories.not_empty_summary: {name} isn't empty — it holds {contents}. What should happen to them?
categories.purge_summary: About to delete {contents}. They move to Trash and stay restorable.
categories.err_check_contents: Could not check what this category contains.

purchases.unit_hint: Receive in this unit — stock converts to base automatically

import_export.format_intro: CSV only. SKU is generated for you — never include it. The header row defines everything:
import_export.format_note: Validation is all-or-nothing: a single bad row rejects the whole file with a clear message.

cashier.hint: Sales are attributed by who collected payment. Cash difference is the sum of closed-shift overage/shortage.

storage_aging.title: Storage Aging
storage_aging.subtitle: Parked stock layers grouped by days in storage — 180+ days flagged as write-down candidates

storage_value.title: Storage Value
storage_value.subtitle: Cost value of parked stock, grouped by storage location then category or supplier

storage_movements.title: Storage Movements
storage_movements.subtitle: Audit log of moves to storage, retrievals and write-offs
storage_movements.empty: No storage movements in this period

storage_recon.title: Storage Reconciliation
storage_recon.subtitle: Integrity check — storage on-hand must equal the net of signed storage movements

expiry.title: Expiry & Batches
expiry.subtitle: Track stock by expiry date (FEFO) — what is expired and what is expiring soon.
expiry.empty: No tracked batches. Receive expiry-tracked stock to populate this.

security.title: Security
security.sub: Manage your password and two-factor authentication

tfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
tfa.hint: Protect your account with a time-based code from an authenticator app.
tfa.setup_text: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or a similar app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
tfa.enabled_rest: Save these one-time backup codes somewhere safe — they won't be shown again.
tfa.disable_text: Enter your current password to confirm. Your authenticator and backup codes will be removed.
tfa.regen_text: Your old backup codes are now invalid. Save these new ones.

cart_display.hint: Pick up to 4 in total — any mix of attributes and category. They appear as small tags beneath the item name.
cart_display.no_fields: No attributes defined yet. Add product attributes first.

favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Search products to add.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.sub: Define tax rates to apply on sales invoices
taxes.err_delete: Cannot delete — tax may be in use.

branch_detail.sub: Branch overview — stock, staff, and today's performance.
branch_detail.at_reorder: variants at or below reorder level
branch_detail.no_staff: No staff assigned to this branch.

notif_prefs.title: Notifications
notif_prefs.sub: Control which alerts you see and which sounds they play
notif_prefs.info_hint: Low-priority updates — payment received, general system messages
notif_prefs.warning_hint: Items needing attention — low stock, shift cash difference
notif_prefs.alert_hint: Action required — invoice voided, access denied
notif_prefs.admin_hint: Messages sent directly from Vendorya admin — always shown

profile.title: My Profile
profile.sub: Update your personal info, photo and password
profile.lang_hint: Switches all UI labels. Saved to your profile and takes effect immediately.
profile.symbol_color_hint1: Tints the currency symbol next to amounts — e.g.
profile.symbol_color_hint2: Saved on this device and applied instantly (no need to press Save).
profile.display_size_hint: Adjusts how big the app and its text appear — just for your account, saved to your profile and applied instantly.
profile.ui_scale_hint: Zooms the whole window, like your browser's zoom.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.sub: Turn whole features on or off for your store. Each switch is optional — turning one off hides it everywhere; nothing is ever deleted.
capabilities.store_type_hint: Set when your store was created. It only chose the starting switches below — you can change any of them anytime.
capabilities.multi_unit_desc: Sell one product in several units — a base unit plus packs or strips, each with its own price and barcode.
capabilities.multi_unit_info: Stock is always counted in the smallest base unit (e.g. Tablet); extra units convert automatically (a Strip of 20 drops 20 from stock). Turn this off and only the base unit is offered at the register — any pack/strip units you set up are hidden but kept, ready to return if you switch it back on.
capabilities.expiry_desc: Track stock as dated batches and always sell the soonest-to-expire first (FEFO) — pharmacy-grade.
capabilities.expiry_info: When on, a tracked product's stock becomes a set of dated batches instead of one number, and sales automatically draw from the earliest expiry first. Turn it off and stock goes back to a single number — existing batch history stays in the database, just hidden, and reappears if you switch it back on.
capabilities.weight_desc: Sell products by weight — per kilogram or per 100 g, with decimal quantities (e.g. 0.350 kg).
capabilities.weight_info: Lets a product be priced and sold by weight instead of by piece (the base unit becomes a gram). The selling screen accepts decimal amounts. This switch reserves the feature; the per-product weight mode arrives in the next update.
capabilities.confirm_multi_unit_enabled: Turning off Multi-Unit Selling means only the base unit will be offered at the register. Any pack/strip units on your products will be hidden.
capabilities.confirm_expiry_tracking_enabled: Turning off Expiry / Batch Tracking means stock goes back to a single number and FEFO stops. Expiry batches already recorded will be hidden.
capabilities.confirm_note: Nothing is deleted — existing data is preserved and comes back if you switch this on again.

policies.title: Business Policies
policies.sub: Control how your store handles sales, stock, and credit
policies.neg_stock_desc: When enabled, the POS can sell items even if stock reaches zero. When disabled, the POS blocks the sale and forces a stock check first.
policies.agel_desc: When enabled, customers can buy on credit — the outstanding amount is added to their balance. When disabled, all invoices must be paid in full at time of sale.
policies.credit_limit_desc: What happens when a customer's unpaid balance would exceed their credit limit. Allow — no enforcement. Warn — sale goes through, store owner is notified. Block — sale is rejected until balance is settled.
policies.default_tax_desc: The tax applied automatically to new invoices if no tax is specified on the product. Set to "None" for tax-exempt stores.
policies.numbering_desc: Controls how the 4-digit product counter (last segment of every SKU) is assigned when a new variant is created.
policies.session_desc: Automatically sign out a user after this many minutes of inactivity. Set to 0 to disable. (Max 1440 = 24h.)
policies.ip_desc: Restrict OWNER and ADMIN logins to specific IP addresses or CIDR ranges (one per line or comma-separated). Leave empty to allow login from anywhere. Cashiers and Managers are not affected.
policies.expiry_desc: Pharmacy-grade tracking: stock is held as dated batches and sold earliest-expiry-first (FEFO). Turn on per product in the product editor. Leave off and nothing changes for your store.
policies.expiry_sale_policy: When a sale would draw from EXPIRED stock

ux.title: UX Settings
ux.sub: Keyboard shortcuts and behaviour for POS and app-wide navigation
ux.pos_shortcuts_sub: Pick any key for each POS action. Conflicts are flagged before applying.
ux.apply_label: Apply my settings to all cashiers
ux.apply_sub: Copies your shortcuts and behaviour to every staff member in this store
ux.appwide_sub: Launch POS or Services from anywhere in the app. These shortcuts work on every page.
ux.conflict_line2: Do you want to reassign it? The previous action will be unset.
ux.confirm_apply: Copy your UX settings to all staff in this store?
ux.confirm_restore: Restore all UX settings to defaults?

tg.autofocus_sub: Returns focus to the search bar after each product is added
tg.beep_sub: Play a short beep tone when a product is added
tg.flash_sub: Flash the screen briefly when a product is added
tg.walkin_sub: Automatically set the Walk-in customer at the start of each sale
tg.quick_sub: Display the Top Selling / Favorites left panel
tg.autoprint_sub: Automatically open the print dialog after a successful sale

billing.title: Billing
billing.sub: Your current Vendorya subscription and invoices.

store.title: Settings
store.sub: Manage your store info, branding, and business rules
store.no_branches_sub: Add a branch to assign staff and manage stock per location.
store.logo_intro: Upload your store logo. It appears in the top header bar so your staff always see your brand.
store.logo_size_b: — PNG or SVG with a transparent background.
store.light_logo_hint: Shown when theme is set to light
store.dark_logo_hint: Shown when theme is set to dark
store.logo_apply_hint: Changes apply immediately after saving. The header logo updates for all staff on next page load.
store.item_noun_hint: Label used for a catalog item across the app (laptop shops prefer "Model").
store.item_noun_rules: Letters, numbers and - only, max 10 characters.
store.cat_levels_hint: Names for the 4 category tiers — column headers and Categories page.
store.cat_levels_empty_hint: Leave a level empty to hide it from column pickers.
store.neg_stock_desc: If off, POS blocks sales when stock is zero
store.agel_desc: Let customers buy on credit and build a balance
store.credit_policy_hint: Allow / Warn / Block when a customer exceeds their credit limit.
store.return_window_hint: Reject returns older than this. 0 = no limit.
store.restock_fee_hint: Deducted from each refund payout. 0 = none.
store.receipt_header_hint: Shown at the top of every printed receipt
store.print_tax_id_hint: When on, your Tax ID prints on every invoice. Turn off to omit it entirely.
store.label_presets_intro: Define label sizes for barcode/price stickers. You can print labels from any purchase invoice.
store.qz_intro: QZ Tray is a desktop app that lets Vendorya print directly to USB/network printers without a print dialog. Install it on the computer connected to your printer, then enter the exact printer name below.
store.qz_steps: Install QZ Tray first, then run the Setup Script — it configures everything automatically. No technical knowledge needed.
store.printers_hint: Enter the exact printer name as it appears in Windows (Control Panel → Devices and Printers). Leave blank to fall back to browser print.
store.output_controls_hint: Controls sent to the receipt printer via QZ Tray on every print job. Test Print uses these values so you can dial them in before going live.
store.copies_hint: Number of receipt copies printed each time.
store.auto_cut_hint: Send the ESC/POS cut command after printing (requires a cutter-equipped printer, e.g. XPrinter *C models).
store.cut_feed_hint: Extra paper to advance before cutting (0–20 mm). Increase if the cut lands too high on the receipt.
store.print_defaults_hint: Pre-tick the print boxes that appear when finishing a sale or a service, so the cashier never has to check them every time. They can still override per transaction.
store.designs_intro: Choose a visual design template for your receipts and labels. The active design is used when printing from POS, purchases, and services.
store.set_printer_first: Set label printer name first (Initial Setup tab)
store.service_types_hint: Define the types of services your store offers. These labels appear in service records.
store.notify_before_hint: Fire notifications when a service's ETA is within this window. 0 = disabled.
store.session_hint: Auto sign out a user after this many minutes of inactivity. 0 = disabled. (Max 1440 = 24h.)
store.ip_hint: Restrict OWNER and ADMIN logins to specific IPs or CIDR ranges (one per line or comma-separated). Leave empty to allow from anywhere.

designs.classic_desc: Standard layout — store header, items table, totals, footer.
designs.compact_desc: Minimal whitespace — great for high-volume POS.
designs.modern_desc: Bold logo area + larger item names. Looks premium.

fv.catalog_desc: Choose which columns staff see in Inventory → Products. Owner and Admin always see everything.
fv.cost_hint: What the store paid per unit

err.print_failed: Print failed — is QZ Tray running?
err.set_receipt_printer: Set a receipt printer name first (Initial Setup tab).
err.delete_in_use: Cannot delete — may be in use.

services.done_body_a: This will create a Sales Invoice for
services.return_body_b: as returned? The invoice stays — this is a record-only action with no financial impact.
services.diagnosis_hint: Engineer notes — saved on Done or Not Yet
services.diagnosis_ph: Describe what was found, parts replaced, steps taken…
